rationale: Empirical lens, all gates green. `go build ./...` and `go vet ./...` exit 0. Owner packages (workspace, bootstrap, guard) PASS. The Phase-1 behavior-preservation full-suite gate PASS across all eight resolver-consumer packages (spec, adr, contextpack, doctor, validate, complete, domain, approve) — no z4ps flake appeared (instruct is not in this set), so no stash-dance needed. `gofmt -l` on the four changed .go files is empty. ZERO file moves confirmed: `git show da7eea3e --diff-filter=RCD --name-only` is empty. Tests are genuine, not tautological: TestResolverMatrix asserts exact paths for all 6 accessors over canonical/legacy/flat fixtures; flat-first precedence, DetectLayout five-state (incl. both mixed hard-errors + recorded-recovery exception), new-id-in-legacy stability, ClassifyLayout/marker purity, both worktree shapes, and the ew79 flat-worktree regression all assert got!=want. Deviation A verified sound (guard/ and worktree.go construct no .mindspec/docs artifact paths; worktree.go only builds worktree-base paths). Deviation B keeps greenfield byte-identical (Req15/AC1) while bootstrap AC4 proves DetectLayout==flat. Scope clean: no Bead 2/4/5 work (only the plan-minor-12 pure helper).

findings.issue: go build ./... and go vet ./... exit 0; gofmt -l on all four changed .go files is empty.
Owner packages (workspace, bootstrap, guard) PASS and all eight resolver-consumer packages PASS (behavior-preservation gate). z4ps flake did not surface (instruct package not exercised).
git show da7eea3e --diff-filter=RCD --name-only is empty — ZERO renames/copies/deletes, confirming pure-additive Phase-1 (Req 15).

Resolver matrix (6 accessors x canonical/legacy/flat), flat-first-wins, DetectLayout five-state incl. both mixed hard-errors and the recorded-migration recovery exception, new-id-in-legacy whole-tree stability, pure ClassifyLayout + LayoutMarkersFromMindspecChildren (trailing-slash/full-path tolerant, ignores mover state dirs), both worktree shapes, and the ew79 flat-worktree TreeRootForSpecDir regression all assert exact got!=want equality. No skips or tautologies.

Confirmed: internal/guard/*.go contains no docs/specs/adr/domains path literals, and internal/workspace/worktree.go only joins WorktreeRoot/SpecWorktreeName (no .mindspec/docs artifact construction). All doc-layout-awareness correctly lives in SpecDir + TreeRootForSpecDir. No missed Req-7 surface.

Born-flat gated on detectLayoutKind==flat (not bare-greenfield) preserves greenfield/canonical/legacy byte-identity (Req15/AC1, TestSpecDir_WorktreeAware_DefaultsToCanonical green) while bootstrap delivers flat (bootstrap_test AC4 asserts DetectLayout==flat post-bootstrap). Defensible and keeps the suite green.

interfaces.md drops the stale GlossaryPath entry — verified `func GlossaryPath` no longer exists in internal/workspace, so this is a correct doc-accuracy cleanup, not a regression. architecture.md additions accurately describe the resolvers and DetectLayout.

resolveArtifact, on a tree with no flat artifact present, calls isFlatTree -> detectLayoutKind which re-probes up to ~7 stats per accessor call (born-flat write-default check). Pure correctness is unaffected and CLI-scale cost is negligible; noting only as a possible future memoization target, not a blocker.
